_readme: Human-verified Kalshi <-> Polymarket market pairs for bot_xvenue.py.
A pair may ONLY be added after reading BOTH venues' resolution rules and
confirming they settle on the same source and the same number. The v0
text-similarity matcher lost money on 'semantically similar but different'
markets — this file is the guard against repeating that.
Known traps found while curating (do NOT add without checking):
- Kalshi KXCPIYOY is HEADLINE CPI YoY; Polymarket's monthly event is
CORE CPI YoY. Different numbers. Not a pair.
- Kalshi mention-markets settle on official transcripts; Polymarket's
settle on video/oracle judgment. Not pairs.
Instances are derived programmatically: the Kalshi date token (e.g. 26JUL)
must match the Polymarket event's endDate month+year. Outcomes map via
outcome_map: kalshi ticker suffix -> polymarket groupItemTitle.

verified_pairs.note: Both settle on the FOMC statement's federal-funds target range change. Kalshi: KXFEDDECISION-<YY><MON>-<outcome>. Polymarket event title 'Fed Decision in <Month>?'.
